name: Portable Digital LC Meter
tagline: High-precision portable LC meter with wide measurement range — from 1 pF / 1 µH to 100 mF / 100 H in two range modes.
description: The Vartech LCM-1 is a high-precision portable LC meter with a 4-digit LCD display. It measures inductance and capacitance across a wide range using two modes: Low Range (C: 1 pF to 10 µF, L: 1 µH to 100 mH) at a 500 kHz test frequency, and High Range (C: 1 µF to 100 mF, L: 100 mH to 100 H) at 500 Hz to 50 kHz. Ideal for incoming component inspection, component sorting, resonant circuit design and general electronics lab work.
features: Low Range — Capacitance: 1 pF ~ 10 µF;  Inductance: 1 µH ~ 100 mH;  Test frequency: 500 kHz
High Range — Capacitance: 1 µF ~ 100 mF;  Inductance: 100 mH ~ 100 H;  Test frequency: 500 Hz ~ 50 kHz
4-digit LCD display — high-resolution readout in both modes
Portable and compact — fits easily in a toolkit or component drawer
High precision — suitable for component sorting and resonant circuit design

specs.label: Test Frequency — L & C Low Range

name: LCR Digital Multimeter — True RMS, 1000 V DC / 750 V AC, 20 A
tagline: 3½-digit True RMS handheld LCR multimeter — inductance, capacitance, resistance, frequency, temperature and full multimeter in one instrument.
description: The Vartech V 8222 H is a 3½-digit True RMS handheld digital multimeter with built-in LCR measurement capability. It measures DC and AC voltage up to 1000 V / 750 V, DC and AC current up to 20 A, resistance up to 200 MΩ, capacitance (20 nF to 2 mF, auto-ranging), inductance (2 mH to 20 H in two auto ranges), frequency and duty cycle up to 20 MHz (7 auto ranges), and temperature (−20 °C to 1000 °C). All accuracies are as listed in the official Vartech catalogue.
features: Inductance — 2 mH to 20 H in 2 auto ranges  |  Accuracy: ±(2.5% rdg + 30 digits)
Capacitance — 20 nF to 2 mF, 6 auto ranges  |  Accuracy: ±(3.5% rdg + 20 digits)
True RMS — accurate on non-sinusoidal waveforms from VFDs and inverters
1000 V DC / 750 V AC and 20 A DC/AC full multimeter capability
Frequency & duty cycle — 10 Hz to 20 MHz (7 auto ranges)
Temperature −20 °C to 1000 °C with probe, transistor (hFE), continuity, diode test
Backlight, torch, data hold, REL, min/max, auto power off

name: Bench Top LCR Meter — 10 Hz to 10 kHz Continuously Variable
tagline: 5-digit bench LCR meter with continuously variable 10 Hz to 10 kHz test frequency, 0.1% basic accuracy, auto component identification and USB/RS232.
description: The Vartech LCR-1B is a bench-top LCR meter with a 5-digit 3.5-inch colour LCD display (primary and secondary), mains operation and 0.1% basic accuracy. It measures L, C, R, Z, X, D, Q, θ and ESR with automatic identification of the component type. The test frequency is continuously variable from 10 Hz to 10 kHz in 1 Hz steps — allowing measurement at any standard or custom frequency. Fast measurement speed is 10 times per second. Internal bias is adjustable 0 to 1500 mV; test level (Vrms) is adjustable 100 to 2000 mV. Open/short correction, five-terminal measurement, 5-gear comparator sorting, handler, RS232 and USB interface (optional).
features: Test parameters: L / C / R / Z / X / D / Q / θ / ESR  |  Basic accuracy: 0.1%
10 Hz ~ 10 kHz continuously variable test frequency in 1 Hz steps
Automatic identification of component type
5-digit display — primary and secondary;  3.5" colour LCD
Fast measurement: 10 times/second (Medium: 5;  Slow: 2)
Internal bias 0 ~ 1500 mV (1 mV steps);  test level 100 ~ 2000 mV (1 mV steps)
Open/short correction;  five measurement terminals;  5-gear comparator sorting
Handler, RS232 & USB interface (optional);  supports SCPI and LabVIEW

specs.label: Test Parameters
specs.value: L / C / R / Z / X / D / Q / θ / ESR

specs.label: Test Frequency
specs.value: 10 Hz ~ 10 kHz  (continuously variable in 1 Hz steps)

specs.label: Interface (Optional)
specs.value: Handler, RS232 & USB;  supports SCPI protocol & LabVIEW

specs.label: Accessories
specs.value: User's manual, mains cord, 4-terminal Kelvin test leads

name: Bench Top LCR Meter — 100 Hz to 10 kHz in 10 Steps
tagline: 5-digit bench LCR meter with 10 fixed test frequencies from 100 Hz to 10 kHz, wider measurement range than LCR-1B and USB/RS232 interface.
description: The Vartech LCR-2A is a bench-top LCR meter with a 5-digit 3.5-inch colour LCD, mains operation and 0.1% basic accuracy. It offers a wider measurement range than the LCR-1B — L: 0.001 µH to 9999 H, C: 0.001 pF to 9999 µF, R: 0.0001 Ω to 99.99 MΩ. The test frequency is selectable across 10 fixed steps from 100 Hz to 10 kHz (100, 120, 200, 400, 800 Hz, 1, 2, 4, 8, 10 kHz). Six test levels from 100 to 2000 mV. Open/short correction, five-terminal measurement, 5-gear comparator sorting and optional handler/RS232/USB interface.
features: Test parameters: L / C / R / Z / X / D / Q / θ / ESR  |  Basic accuracy: 0.1%
Test frequency: 10 steps from 100 Hz to 10 kHz (100, 120, 200, 400, 800 Hz, 1K, 2K, 4K, 8K, 10 kHz)
Wider measurement range than LCR-1B: L to 9999 H, C to 9999 µF, R to 99.99 MΩ
Automatic identification of component type
5-digit display — primary and secondary;  3.5" colour LCD
Internal bias 0 ~ 1500 mV;  six test level options: 100 / 300 / 600 / 1000 / 1500 / 2000 mV
Open/short correction;  five measurement terminals;  5-gear comparator sorting
Optional handler, RS232 & USB;  supports SCPI and LabVIEW
